reviews.review_msg: Very good prof! Keeps the class interesting with class activities. Pretty chill and very helpful. Read her lecture slides more than the book!  Stuff on the lecture slides (as well as topics discussed in class) will more likely be on the exam. Also read the case studies as participation heavily counts on them.

Mila was fair, straight-forward, and realistic. She understood what it's like to be a student. Participation is important, but not really difficult..just say what's on your mind. Her exams were fair because she tells you ahead of time to focus on her slides. No real surprises...

I beg to differ from previous comments. She is a good and fair teacher. This has to be the easiest 3 credit UD Bus course in the faculty. If you go to her for help, she will help and you will succeed. I highly recommend  her!
BUS 432 is **** with her. I do not know why I did take it. The worst class ever. Nevertheless, if you take it, do lecture notes and study using her PPT slides.

BUS 346 and BUS 432.  She is a fair prof. Her lectures can be really boring sometimes but that's what you expect in IB and HR. Her exams are fair.  The workload for the assignments are acceptable but grammar do counts!  Make sure you go to her lectures and memorize all the slides.  Read the text.  And write as much as you can in exams.

I didn't notice any favouritism in the class. Marking was fair and assignments and quizzes/exams were straightforward and similar to those found in other business courses. Participation DOES count. If you need clarification, she is willing to answer questions in and outside of class.  I'd take another course with her.
Don't study, just make sure she likes you.
I don't know what I was doing in her class. Attention dictates the grades.
you better win her attention if you want your As.
very unclear expectations...does not have a marking key for papers (essays)...demonstrates favourtism...have to win her over personally before she'll give you the time of day on your work

She only talks n talks...taking forever...one course = 3 courses materials, expect u to read EVERYTHING she assigned. No notes, no outline, donno what she wants...(but improving) but she's a very nice person, willing to help u 1 on 1 also.
Too many readings. Marking is very subjective.
Nice lady. Easy course, but too much extra reading of little benefit. Better off just summarizing into lecture notes.
